news.t: Race for Most Valuable Company May Be Good for GGLL
Big Tech's AI Bets Pay Off: How to Play Latest Earnings

holdings.infoBox: GGLL is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 37.66%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 25.30%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 20.19%, Alphabet at 12.33%, and Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 5.97%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily GOOGL Bull 2X ETF (GGLL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Google stock. GGLL was launched on Sep 7, 2022 and is issued by Direxion.
